config.title: Karta pracownika #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'CCardBuilder #include "50131" 'GetMenu #include "50506" 'section_* #include "50222" 'std_openform_field_hli #include "50610" 'fire_choicelist #include "50200"
'add_to_choicelist 'delete_from_choicelist_hli #include "50102"
'popraw dane #include "50609"
#include "50101"
dim g_bLocalMode : g_bLocalMode = true dim g_idRoot : g_idRoot = 0 dim g_ShowAllBar: g_ShowAllBar = false
function get_root_obj() if g_bLocalMode then set get_root_obj = page_.root else set get_root_obj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,get_root_obj_idobj()) end if end function
function get_root_obj_idobj() if g_bLocalMode then get_root_obj_idobj = page_.rootidobj else get_root_obj_idobj = g_idRoot end if end function
dim g_pCardBuilder : set g_pCardBuilder = nothing
function fopen : fopen = false
if not HARUI(UOR_READ(TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK)) then exit function end if
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_NALICZENIA trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_KARTA_PRAC) = 0 trans_.var(GVAR_EMPLOYEE_CARD_LAST_12_MONTHS) = 0 #endif
trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_EMPLOYEE) = clng(page_.root.idobj)
set g_pCardBuilder = new CCardBuilder
g_pCardBuilder.prepare_framework_ex page_.topelement,false,true,true,CTRLID_LEFT_PANE,CTRLID_RIGHT_PANE
build_menu rebuild_contents
section_fopen THIS_FILE
fopen = true end function
'called once to build menu sub build_menu 'dodajemy menu items with g_pCardBuilder.menu
.add_item "Popraw dane", "varFunction=""popraw_dane""" .add_item "Nowa umowa", "varFunction=""nowa_umowa""" .add_item "Nowa choroba", "varFunction=""nowa_choroba""" .add_item "Nowa nieobecność", "varFunction=""nowa_nieobecnosc""" .add_item "Nowy inny składnik", "varFunction=""nowy_inny""" .add_item "Dodaj do listy wyboru","varFunctionHLI=""add_to_choicelist"" vs100=""TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK"" vs101=""" + cstr(get_root_obj().idobj) + """ " .add_item "Usuń z listy wyboru","varFunctionHLI=""delete_from_choicelist_hli"" vs100=""0"" vs101=""0"" vs102=""TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK"" " end with end sub
dim g_pPlugFactory : set g_pPlugFactory = nothing
'called on every root object change (including fopen) sub rebuild_contents set g_pPlugFactory = doc_.getmodule(60172) with g_pCardBuilder .reset_framework
'title .title = Ucase(page_.root.strImie + " " + page_.root.strNazwisko)
g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_podstawowe .new_section(.fixedpane, "Informacje podstawowe"), page_.rootidobj g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_adresy .new_section(.fixedpane, "Adres korespondecji/zameldowania"), page_.rootidobj
#ifdef _IOW if not g_ShowAllBar then dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = .new_section(.fixedpane, "Pokaż szczegóły dotyczące naliczeń").addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_BODY dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Pokaż" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllBar" end with
else g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_naliczenia .new_section(.leftpane, "Naliczenia"), page_.rootidobj
.new_section .leftpane,"Transakcje" .new_section .leftpane,"Płatności" .new_section .leftpane,"Kalendarz" end if #else
g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_naliczenia .new_section(.leftpane, "Naliczenia"), page_.rootidobj
.new_section .leftpane,"Transakcje" .new_section .leftpane,"Płatności" .new_section .leftpane,"Kalendarz" #endif
g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_pic .new_section(.rightpane, "Zdjęcie"), page_.rootidobj .new_section .rightpane,"Konta" .new_section .rightpane,"Umowy" .new_section .rightpane,"Nieobecności" .new_section .rightpane,"Choroby" end with end sub
sub ShowAllBar(pHLI) dim pModule60106: set pModule60106 = doc_.getmodule(60106) g_ShowAllBar = pModule60106.FindRightForShowAllBar() if not g_ShowAllBar then trans_.message 7000, 0, "Nie posiadasz uprawnień do wyświetlenia szczegółów dotyczących naliczeń." end if frefresh end sub
function fclose #ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_NALICZENIA trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_KARTA_PRAC) = -1 trans_.var(GVAR_EMPLOYEE_CARD_LAST_12_MONTHS) = -1 #endif section_fclose THIS_FILE set g_pCardBuilder = nothing end function
function frefresh rebuild_contents end function
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_NALICZENIA sub ShowAllNalicz(pHLI) if pHLI.exists(100) then trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_KARTA_PRAC) = pHLI.prop(100) end if if pHLI.exists(101) then trans_.var(GVAR_EMPLOYEE_CARD_LAST_12_MONTHS) = pHLI.prop(101) end if frefresh 'ustaw się na wybranej zakładce page_.ctrl(CTRLID_LEFT_PANE).activeitem = trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_KARTA_PRAC) end sub #endif
'---------------------------------------------------------------- function c##CTRLID_LEFT_PANE##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) c##CTRLID_LEFT_PANE##_ongetdata = true #ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_NALICZENIA RefreshLeftPanel oCtrl #endif end function
function RefreshLeftPanel(byref oTabCtrl) dim nActiveItem: nActiveItem = trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_KARTA_PRAC) select case nActiveItem case 2 g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_transakcje oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj case 3 g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_platnosci oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj case 4 g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_kalendarz oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj,trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) end select trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_KARTA_PRAC) = 0 trans_.var(GVAR_EMPLOYEE_CARD_LAST_12_MONTHS) = 0 end function
function c##CTRLID_LEFT_PANE##_ontabitemactivate(oTabCtrl,nActiveItem,bFirstTime) if not bFirstTime then exit function end if
select case nActiveItem case 2 g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_transakcje oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj case 3 g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_platnosci oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj case 4 g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_kalendarz oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj,trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) end select end function
function c##CTRLID_RIGHT_PANE##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) c##CTRLID_RIGHT_PANE##_ongetdata = true end function function c##CTRLID_RIGHT_PANE##_ontabitemactivate(oTabCtrl,nActiveItem,bFirstTime) if not bFirstTime then exit function end if
select case nActiveItem case 2 g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_konta oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj case 3 g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_umowy oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj case 4 g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_nieobecnosci oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj case 5 g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_choroby oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj end select end function '---------------------------------------------------------------- function nowa_umowa doc_.postcommand "OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5PLUMOWA,0,USAGE_ZAWARCIE)" end function
function nowa_choroba doc_.postcommand "OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5PLCHOROBA,0,USAGE_EDIT)" end function
function nowa_nieobecnosc doc_.postcommand "OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5PLNIEOB,0,USAGE_EDIT)" end function
function nowy_inny doc_.postcommand "OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5PLPOZOSTALE,0,USAGE_EDIT)" end function
